prompt: Create a tall vertical fantasy anime illustration of the goddess of garments, a divine bride-like woman standing full body in the center of an ornate cathedral alcove. She wears an opulent pure white couture gown with a fitted embroidered bodice, translucent layered silk, long flowing train, pearl strands, dangling beadwork, floral appliqué, and oversized puff sleeves. A huge lace veil with extremely intricate filigree edging drapes over her head and body; she gently lifts the veil with both hands. Her silver-white hair is long, wavy, and luminous, decorated on one side with a large bouquet of white roses, lilies, feathers, and pearl ornaments. Her face is softly obscured beneath the veil, with a pale featureless glow for an ethereal sacred presence. Behind her is a large circular halo window filled with delicate carved lace-like patterns, framed by dark Gothic Art Nouveau architecture with two small rosette ornaments near the upper corners. The background fades into a starry black-gray night with tiny sparkles, while the foreground is filled with billowing white fabric pooled around her feet and ornate pointed white shoes. Use a palette of ivory, pearl white, soft silver, warm beige, and charcoal gray, ultra-detailed linework, luminous soft lighting, delicate porcelain texture, high-fashion bridal fantasy design, symmetrical composition, romantic sacred atmosphere, no text, no watermark, vertical 9:16.
